name: dotseal-vscode
description: Edit dotseal encrypted env files (.env.enc, .env.production.enc, …) as decrypted virtual documents.

scripts.pretest: npm run ensure-test-fixtures && npm run build && npm run check

dotseal.autoOpen.description: Automatically open dotenv-style encrypted env files (.env.enc, .env.production.enc, …) through dotseal's decrypted virtual editor.

dotseal.keyFile.description: Optional path to a dotseal master key file. When empty, dotseal searches upward for .dotseal.key.

dotseal.masterKey.description: Optional base64 dotseal master key. Only honored from USER settings — values in workspace settings are ignored, because workspace settings are typically committed to git. Prefer DOTSEAL_MASTER_KEY or .dotseal.key instead of storing secrets in editor settings.

dotseal.plaintextKeys.description: Exact variable names to keep unencrypted when the virtual editor creates a new encrypted env file (first save only). Existing files keep the policy stored in their footer; use the CLI to change policy later.

dotseal.plaintextKeyRegex.description: Regex patterns; keys that fully match are kept unencrypted when the virtual editor creates a new encrypted env file (first save only). Existing files keep the policy stored in their footer; use the CLI to change policy later.
